profile_or_schema_requirement: claim scope fixed to observation_and_processing_only
paper_or_dashboard_use: Shared claims sentence; hostile-reviewer boundary box
caution: Do not infer truth, legality, compliance, certification, or safety from structural validity alone

profile_or_schema_requirement: non_claims array required with six baseline values plus conditional authenticity_finality for C2PA/media-provenance states
caution: Translation caution still needs reviewer discipline even when non-claims are structurally complete

profile_or_schema_requirement: action controlled vocabulary observed/extracted/classified/reviewed/clustered/published/superseded
paper_or_dashboard_use: Lifecycle coverage chart and attestation timeline
caution: One valid action only proves one bounded processing step

profile_or_schema_requirement: at least one input or one output must be present
caution: Receipts may still be incomplete on hashes or authority depth even when one trace object exists

profile_or_schema_requirement: published envelopes must target artifact subject and emit at least one output
caution: Do not paraphrase local publication object as external witness or truth claim

profile_or_schema_requirement: observed envelopes restricted to source_record subjects
caution: Observation receipts still attest retrieval/provenance only, not source truth or authority sufficiency

profile_or_schema_requirement: extracted envelopes restricted to source_record subjects
caution: Extraction receipts show bounded transformation from source material, not substantive correctness of extracted interpretation

profile_or_schema_requirement: classified envelopes restricted to case_record or crosswalk_row subjects
caution: Classification assignment does not prove truth, legality, or final taxonomy correctness beyond the recorded process

profile_or_schema_requirement: reviewed envelopes require case_record or crosswalk_row subject, review_status, and at least one review_note
caution: Review sufficiency is procedural, not substantive correctness

profile_or_schema_requirement: clustered envelopes restricted to duplicate_cluster or case_record
caution: Cluster membership does not prove same-event truth beyond documented linkage logic

profile_or_schema_requirement: superseded envelopes require artifact or case_record subject, replacement output, and review note
caution: Supersession shows bounded correction handling, not unrecoverable prior error in substantive claims

profile_or_schema_requirement: logged/proof_pending/proof_verified transparency states require log system, receipt URI, and receipt hash
caution: Presence of fields is not proof of real inclusion unless verifier evidence exists

profile_or_schema_requirement: issued/revoked/superseded VC states require credential_id and issuer
caution: VC issuance cannot be paraphrased as certification or legal validation

profile_or_schema_requirement: placeholder/signed signature states require signing scheme and signature ref; signed_verified also requires trust anchor ref and verifier note
evidence_surface: profile signature placeholder discussion + schema if/then
caution: Placeholder metadata must not be paraphrased as a live verified signature

profile_or_schema_requirement: subject kinds limited to case_record/source_record/duplicate_cluster/crosswalk_row/artifact
paper_or_dashboard_use: Field dictionary for reviewers and dashboard engineers
caution: Subject typing keeps source, case, cluster, and artifact claims separate

profile_or_schema_requirement: assertions must be non-empty and use typed small entries
caution: Schema can require shape, but process-level wording still needs human review

profile_or_schema_requirement: machine translation should not justify final legal or policy interpretation alone
caution: Requires reviewer discipline, not just schema validation

profile_or_schema_requirement: dashboard_hooks use controlled observatory-view vocabulary
evidence_surface: profile dashboard hook section + schema enum
caution: Hook presence does not validate downstream figure correctness

profile_or_schema_requirement: stronger packaging layers cannot silently mutate core non-claims around truth, legality, compliance, certification, or safety
caution: Must remain explicit whenever signature, transparency, VC, or C2PA rows are discussed

profile_or_schema_requirement: superseded envelopes require explicit prior receipt ID, superseded locator, superseded hash, reason code, and replacement scope
evidence_surface: profile supersession guidance + schema if/then + dedicated supersession object
paper_or_dashboard_use: Correction-lineage appendix row and reviewer-facing change-log legend
caution: Correction lineage still attests bounded process replacement only, not global finality or substantive truth
